nasb.text: Wild oxen will also fall with them And young bulls with strong ones; Thus their land will be soaked with blood, And their dust become greasy with fat.

esv.text: Wild oxen shall fall with them, and young steers with the mighty bulls. Their land shall drink its fill of blood, and their soil shall be gorged with fat.

cnv.text: 野牛、牛犢與壯牛要與他們一同倒下， 他們的地喝足了血， 他們的塵土因脂肪而肥潤。

ccb.text: 他们像野牛、牛犊和公牛一样倒下。 他们的土地被血浸透， 土壤被脂肪覆盖。

csbs.text: 野牛、公牛和壮牛都将与他们一同倒下； 他们的地将喝足血， 他们的尘土将沾满脂肪。
